items.definition_en: A mother is a female parent.
A father is a male parent.
items.example_en: My father drives me to school.

items.definition_en: A parent is a mother or father.
items.example_en: Each parent came to the meeting.

items.definition_en: A child is a young person.
items.example_en: Each child played in the park.

items.definition_en: A son is a male child.
A daughter is a female child.
A brother is a male sibling.
items.example_en: My brother helps me with homework.

items.definition_en: A sister is a female sibling.
items.example_en: My sister is younger than me.

items.definition_en: A grandmother is the mother of your parent.
A grandfather is the father of your parent.
An uncle is the brother of your parent.
items.example_en: My uncle lives in another city.

items.definition_en: An aunt is the sister of your parent.
items.example_en: My aunt sends me birthday cards.

items.definition_en: A cousin is the child of your aunt or uncle.
items.example_en: My cousin is coming to visit this weekend.

items.definition_en: A baby is a very young child.
A husband is a married man.
items.example_en: Her husband works at a bank.

items.definition_en: A wife is a married woman.
A relative is someone in your family.
items.example_en: We visit our relatives every summer.
